column1: # 10015 — Incomplete or No Cache-control Header Set
# Accept for API responses (cache is handled at CDN level)
# API backend doesn't serve HTML frames
# Dev comments in built frontend — acceptable for staging
# Timestamps in API responses are intentional
# 40012 — Cross Site Scripting (Reflected) — FAIL on production
# API uses JWT + HMAC, not cookie-based CSRF
